evals.prompt: I have this prompt: 'You are an expert. Review the code and find bugs. Be thorough.' - make it better with XML structure
evals.expected_output: Properly structured XML prompt with role, context, task, and output_format tags
expectations: Adds <context> with what information model needs
Result is more specific than original

evals.prompt: Create a prompt template for an autonomous agent that needs to deploy code safely
evals.expected_output: XML-structured agent prompt with goal, stop conditions, and constraints
expectations: Uses <stop_conditions> with success AND failure criteria
